mapper.insert: insert into supp_settlement_invoice (id, tenant_id, supp_settlement_id, invoice_id, create_time, delete_by, delete_time) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{suppSettlementId}, #{invoiceId}, now(), null, null)
mapper.update: update supp_settlement_invoice set delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now() where supp_settlement_id = #{suppSettlementId} and invoice_id = #{invoiceId} and (delete_by is null or delete_by = '')
mapper.select: select id, tenant_id, supp_settlement_id, invoice_id, create_time, delete_by, delete_time from supp_settlement_invoice where supp_settlement_id = #{suppSettlementId} and (delete_by is null or delete_by = '') order by create_time
